executive_summary.description: A high-level overview of the public data sources available in Richmond, Virginia, concerning 311 services and resident service navigation, summarizing the key systems and data availability.

source_name.description: Name of the data source or dataset.

description.description: Description of the information contained in the data source.

update_frequency.description: How often the data is updated (e.g., Manual, Daily).

access_method.description: The method to access the data (e.g., OData API, CSV Download, Web Portal).

access_link.description: The direct URL or endpoint for accessing the data.

data_provider.description: The city department or organization that provides the data.

public_data_sources.description: A detailed list of public data sources relevant to resident service navigation. Each entry should include the name of the data source or dataset, a description of the information it contains, its update cadence (e.g., manual, daily, weekly), and the specific methods for access (e.g., CSV download, OData endpoint, API URL, web portal link).

rva_311_system_details.description: Comprehensive information about the Richmond RVA 311 system, including its mission, how it functions, the types of requests it handles, and the partner agencies involved. Details should cover the call center operations and self-service options.

richmond_open_data_portal.description: An overview of the Richmond Open Data Portal (data.richmondgov.com), its purpose, and the types of data categories it hosts, with a focus on the 'Well-Managed Government' section.

phone_number.description: Primary phone number for the department.

physical_address.description: Physical address of the department office.

service_category.description: The main category of the service (e.g., Bills & Taxes, Public Safety).

service_link.description: A direct link to the service page or portal.

responsible_department.description: The city department responsible for the service.

platform_name.description: The name of the primary CRM platform (e.g., rvaone).

platform_provider.description: The company providing the CRM technology (e.g., Granicus).

web_portal_url.description: URL for the public-facing web portal.

ios_app_link.description: Link to the iOS mobile app in the App Store.

android_app_link.description: Link to the Android mobile app in the Play Store.

historical_platforms.description: Information on previously used platforms like SeeClickFix.

resource_name.description: Name of the API or developer resource (e.g., OData for SeeClickFix Data).

resource_type.description: Type of resource (e.g., OData v2, OData v4, Documentation).

endpoint_url.description: The URL for the API endpoint or resource.

description.description: Description of the resource and the data it provides.

notes.description: Any relevant notes, such as data limitations or standards compliance (e.g., Open311).

method.description: The method of submission (e.g., Phone, Web Portal, Mobile App).

contact_or_link.description: Specific contact information (phone number) or URL for the method.

availability.description: When the method is available (e.g., 24/7, Business Hours).

service_request_status_tracking.description: Instructions for residents on how to track the status of a submitted 311 service request. This should explain how to use a request ID for public requests and the benefits of creating a registered account for tracking both public and private requests.

data_source_name.description: The name of the data source with limitations.

limitation.description: A description of the limitation (e.g., Outdated data, manual update frequency).

impact.description: The impact of this limitation on data usability for real-time analysis.

privacy_considerations.description: A summary of how the RVA311 system handles user privacy and personally identifiable information (PII). This includes which information is kept private and the option to submit certain types of requests anonymously.

url.description: The direct link to the tool.

responsible_department.description: The city department that maintains the tool.
